betterquesting:10.desc:8:
The §6Charcoal Log§f (advancedrocketry:charcoallog) is a §6single block§f world-gen block that spawns on §6charred, fire-scorched planets§f in the AR progression — planets with §6burnt forests§f, §6volcanic activity§f, or §6post-apocalyptic atmospheres§f. The block has a §6blackened, charred wood appearance§f and is the §6signature resource block§f of fire-themed planetary missions.

§6Production Path (world generation)§f:
- Source: §6Charcoal Log§f is generated by AR's planet dimension system on charred planets
- It cannot be crafted — it must be §6mined from a charred planet§f during a landing mission
- Drops: 1x §6Charcoal Log§f when mined with any axe (will §6burn the player§f if the planet's atmosphere is §6flammable§f and the player is not wearing a §6Space Suit§f)

The block is the §6prerequisite§f for the §6Electric Mushroom§f (10079) and the §6Carbon Brick§f (10002) chains. Charcoal logs are §6also§f the source of §6carbon§f for the §6CO2 Scrubber§f (10050) recipe.

This quest is a prerequisite for the §6Electric Mushroom§f (10079) — the §6last in the alien planet material questline§f. Charcoal logs are also required for the §6Carbon Brick§f (10002) chain which feeds the §6Electric Arc Furnace§f (10004) and the §6CO2 Scrubber§f (10050).

§eTip§f: Charcoal logs are most commonly found on planets with §6Charred Forest§f biomes — these are typically §6high-temperature, low-oxygen worlds§f. Bring at least 32 logs per mission because the §6CO2 Scrubber§f (10050) consumes 1 carbon brick per 100 ticks of operation. The §6carbon§f can also be §6smelted into carbon ingots§f for use in the §6Electric Arc Furnace§f (10004).
